DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to the causes of action for negligence, breach of warranty of habitability (tort and contract) with leave to amend to allege in good faith a landlord-tenant relationship between Plaintiff and the moving defendant and to expressly allege inconsistencies (sham pleading doctrine) between the allegations in the verified complaint and the First Amended Complaint. Demurrer is sustained as to all other causes of action. No leave of Court was obtained to add those causes of action.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
